case_title: CHARLES PETER BELLFIELD VS. LOANSTAR MORTGAGEE SERVICES, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-27-2006 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING NOV-27-2006 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: SCOTT HUGHES, CSR#12365. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELLFIELD, CHARLES PETER AS TO DEFENDANT LOANSTAR MORTGAGEE SERVICES, LLC WELLS FARGO BANK, INC. EQUITY GROWTH ASSETS MANAGEMENT, INC. MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-28-2006 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST CHARLES PETER BELLFIELD FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-28-2006, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-12-2006. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: PATTY L. HUBBLE CSR#3058. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-28-2006 CONTINUED TO NOV-27-2006 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUN-06-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-06-2006 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST CHARLES PETER BELLFIELD FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-06-2006 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-21-2006. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-28-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-14-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Scott Hughes, CSR#12365. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2006 Continued To Nov-27-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The order to show cause is re-set to 11/27/2006 at 1:30 PM in Dept. 212. Proceedings reported by: Patty L. Hubble CSR#3058. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-05-2006 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-28-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2006 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Dave Davenport, CSR #1694. (212)
